results.question: How many providers are there for each specialty, specifically for specialties with 'Unknown' in their name?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?specialty (COUNT(DISTINCT ?provider) AS ?providerCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-npi-registry> WHERE {
  ?provider <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-npi-registry/type/Provider> .
  ?provider <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-npi-registry/pred/provider_has_specialty> ?specialty .
  ?specialty <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-npi-registry/type/Specialty> .
  ?specialty <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-npi-registry/pred/specialty_name> ?specialtyName .
  FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?specialtyName), 'unknown'))
} GROUP BY ?specialty ORDER BY DESC(?providerCount) LIMIT 10

per_seed.sql: SELECT T2."specialty_name", COUNT(*) FROM "Provider" AS T1 JOIN "Specialty" AS T2 ON T1."specialty_id" = T2."specialty_id" WHERE T2."specialty_name" LIKE '%Unknown%' GROUP BY T2."specialty_name"
all_sql_attempts: SELECT T2."specialty_name", COUNT(*) FROM "Provider" AS T1 JOIN "Specialty" AS T2 ON T1."specialty_id" = T2."specialty_id" WHERE T2."specialty_name" LIKE '%Unknown%' GROUP BY T2."specialty_name"
per_seed.answer: specialty_name: Unknown, COUNT(*): 46

per_seed.sql: SELECT T2."specialty_name", COUNT(*) FROM "Provider" AS T1 JOIN "Specialty" AS T2 ON T1."specialty_id" = T2."specialty_id" WHERE T2."specialty_name" LIKE '%Unknown%' GROUP BY T2."specialty_name"
all_sql_attempts: SELECT T2."specialty_name", COUNT(*) FROM "Provider" AS T1 JOIN "Specialty" AS T2 ON T1."specialty_id" = T2."specialty_id" WHERE T2."specialty_name" LIKE '%Unknown%' GROUP BY T2."specialty_name"
per_seed.answer: specialty_name: Unknown, COUNT(*): 46

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table Provider: 10000 rows (from Provider.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Provider" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER,
  "provider_type_id" TEXT,
  "display_name" TEXT,
  "specialty_id" TEXT,
  "taxonomy_group_id" TEXT,
  "enumeration_date" TEXT,
  "status" TEXT,
  "sole_proprietor" TEXT,
  "state_id" TEXT,
  "city_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Provider:
--   provider_id='1699441469', provider_type_id='individual', display_name='ZACHARY A CROMES', specialty_id='374700000X', taxonomy_group_id='technical', enumeration_date='2021-08-20', status='A', sole_proprietor='NO', state_id='OH', city_id='OH__marysville'
--   provider_id='1184227050', provider_type_id='individual', display_name='BRIDGET AALSETH', specialty_id='183500000X', taxonomy_group_id='pharmacy', enumeration_date='2020-11-20', status='A', sole_proprietor='NO', state_id='OH', city_id='OH__worthington'

-- Table ProviderType: 2 rows (from ProviderType.csv)
CREATE TABLE "ProviderType" (
  "provider_type_id" TEXT,
  "provider_type_name" TEXT,
  "description" TEXT,
  "provider_count" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from ProviderType:
--   provider_type_id='individual', provider_type_name='Individual (NPI-1)', description='A single healthcare provider enumerated ', provider_count='6230'
--   provider_type_id='organization', provider_type_name='Organization (NPI-2)', description='A healthcare organization enumerated as ', provider_count='3770'

-- Table Specialty: 442 rows (from Specialty.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Specialty" (
  "specialty_id" TEXT,
  "taxonomy_code" TEXT,
  "specialty_name" TEXT,
  "taxonomy_group_id" TEXT,
  "provider_count" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Specialty:
--   specialty_id='374700000X', taxonomy_code='374700000X', specialty_name='Technician', taxonomy_group_id='technical', provider_count='3'
--   specialty_id='183500000X', taxonomy_code='183500000X', specialty_name='Pharmacist', taxonomy_group_id='pharmacy', provider_count='266'

-- Table TaxonomyGroup: 12 rows (from TaxonomyGroup.csv)
CREATE TABLE "TaxonomyGroup" (
  "taxonomy_group_id" TEXT,
  "taxonomy_group_name" TEXT,
  "provider_count" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from TaxonomyGroup:
--   taxonomy_group_id='technical', taxonomy_group_name='Technical / Allied', provider_count='616'
--   taxonomy_group_id='pharmacy', taxonomy_group_name='Pharmacy', provider_count='467'

-- Table PracticeLocation: 10000 rows (from PracticeLocation.csv)
CREATE TABLE "PracticeLocation" (
  "practice_location_id" TEXT,
  "provider_id" INTEGER,
  "address_line" TEXT,
  "city_id" TEXT,
  "state_id" TEXT,
  "postal_code" INTEGER,
  "phone" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from PracticeLocation:
--   practice_location_id='1699441469__loc', provider_id='1699441469', address_line='104 N MAIN ST', city_id='OH__marysville', state_id='OH', postal_code='43040', phone='937-537-5100'
--   practice_location_id='1184227050__loc', provider_id='1184227050', address_line='918 N HIGH ST', city_id='OH__worthington', state_id='OH', postal_code='43085', phone='614-888-6366'

-- Table State: 52 rows (from State.csv)
CREATE TABLE "State" (
  "state_id" TEXT,
  "state_name" TEXT,
  "country_code" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from State:
--   state_id='OH', state_name='OH', country_code='US'
--   state_id='NY', state_name='NY', country_code='US'

-- Table City: 759 rows (from City.csv)
CREATE TABLE "City" (
  "city_id" TEXT,
  "city_name" TEXT,
  "state_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from City:
--   city_id='OH__marysville', city_name='Marysville', state_id='OH'
--   city_id='OH__worthington', city_name='Worthington', state_id='OH'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   City.city_id -> PracticeLocation.practice_location_id
--   City.city_id -> Provider.provider_id
--   City.city_id -> State.state_id
--   PracticeLocation.practice_location_id -> City.city_id
--   PracticeLocation.practice_location_id -> Provider.provider_id
--   Provider.provider_id -> City.city_id
--   Provider.provider_id -> PracticeLocation.practice_location_id
--   Provider.provider_id -> ProviderType.provider_type_id
--   Provider.provider_id -> Specialty.specialty_id
--   Provider.provider_id -> State.state_id
